name: kagome_correlations_2x2

method.ground_state: Lanczos refined seeded by p6m (Γ, B_1) projection of random complex RBM

ground_state.comment: S_total = 0 confirms singlet ground state (sum rule Σ_{ij}⟨S_i·S_j⟩ = S(S+1))

interpretation.energy_consistency: PASS — 24·(NN avg) = -5.4449 = E_0/J at machine precision
interpretation.120_AFM_Bragg_peak: ABSENT — S(K-equiv)/N = 0.395/12 = 0.033 finite, not extensive.  No long-range AFM order on this cluster.
interpretation.120_AFM_signature_strength: S(K)/S(M) = 1.00 (degenerate at all 3 non-Γ points): the 2×2 cluster has insufficient k-resolution to distinguish K from M.  Diagnostic for ordering vs liquid requires N=27+ where K and M are inequivalent.
interpretation.spin_liquid_interpretation: Consistent with quantum-disordered ground state.  S(K) finite (not divergent with N) at this cluster size — but finite-size scaling needed.

correlations_by_pair.comment: Full 12×12 lower-triangle ⟨S_i·S_j⟩ matrix in script stdout. Site indexing: i = 3·(cx·Ly+cy)+sub.

notes: First static spin-correlation measurement on the project's ED-quality kagome AFM ground state. Total wall time: <1 second. Direct cross-check against Lanczos E_0 to 5 digits via the Heisenberg sum-rule E_0 = J·Σ_{NN bonds}⟨S_i·S_j⟩.  Static structure factor S(q) is bounded (no Bragg divergence) at all four momentum points of the 2×2 PBC supercell, ruling out classical 120° order on this cluster.  Distinguishing ordered vs liquid requires the larger N=27+ cluster where K and M are momentum-inequivalent.
